name: Robotic Arm
description: 4-DOF physical robotic manipulator capable of moving to coordinates and actuating a gripper.

capabilities.name: Reset Arm
capabilities.description: Resets the robotic arm to its home position.

capabilities.name: Arm: Front High
capabilities.description: Moves the robotic arm to the Front High position.

capabilities.name: Arm: Right Reach
capabilities.description: Moves the robotic arm to the Right Reach position.

capabilities.name: Arm: Right Low
capabilities.description: Moves the robotic arm to the Right Low position.
